heading: Acquisition of additional lands and buildings
label: 407m–1 Acquisition of additional lands and buildings
text: The Secretary of the Interior is authorized to acquire by donation or with donated funds, or to acquire by purchase, the land and buildings immediately adjacent to, but not including, the St. George’s Methodist Church property, which land and buildings are identified generally as 318, 320, and 322 New Street, for inclusion in the Independence National Historical Park: , That the Secretary shall first enter into an agreement with the proprietor or proprietors of the St. George’s Methodist Church property, such agreement to contain the usual and customary provisions for the protection and physical maintenance of said church property, without expense to the United States, in keeping with, but not as a part of, the nearby Independence National Historical Park and providing for its continued use, without limitation or control, for customary church purposes.Provided
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as a part of , , as amended, which comprises this subchapter.act June 28, 1948, ch. 68762 Stat. 1061

Appropriations, , , provided that:Pub. L. 86–54, § 273 Stat. 88June 23, 1959“There are hereby authorized to be appropriated such sums, not exceeding $25,000, as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of section 1 of this Act [this section].”
